revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]]</includeonly>

<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]
 |text     = This {{module other|module|template}} [[:Category:{{{cat|Wikidata tracking categories}}}|tracks]] and uses<!--
--> {{#if:{{{section|}}} | one or more [[Wikidata]] properties; see [[#{{{section}}}|§ {{{section}}}]] for details.<!--
                     --> | [[Wikidata]] propert{{#if:{{{2|}}}|ies|y}}: {{#invoke:Uses Wikidata|usesProperty}} }}
}}{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|testcases|doc=<!--nocat-->|#default={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|Uses Wikidata|<!--
-->|{{module other|[[Category:Modules using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Modules tracking Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{template other|[[Category:Templates using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates tracking Wikidata]]}} }}
  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}<!--Please add any categories to the /doc page -->

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Tracks and uses Wikidata]]</includeonly>

<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]
 |text     = This {{module other|module|template}} [[:Category:{{{cat|Wikidata tracking categories}}}|tracks]] and uses<!--
--> {{#if:{{{section|}}} | one or more [[Wikidata]] properties; see [[#{{{section}}}|§ {{{section}}}]] for details.<!--
                     --> | [[Wikidata]] propert{{#if:{{{2|}}}|ies|y}}: {{#invoke:Uses Wikidata|usesProperty}} }}
}}{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|testcases|doc=<!--nocat-->|#default={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|Uses Wikidata|<!--
-->|{{module other|[[Category:Modules using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Modules tracking Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{template other|[[Category:Templates using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates tracking Wikidata]]}} }}
  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}<!--Please add any categories to the /doc page -->

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]
 |text     = This {{module other|module|template}} [[:Category:{{{cat|Wikidata tracking categories}}}|tracks]] and uses<!--
--> {{#if:{{{section|}}} | one or more [[Wikidata]] properties; see [[#{{{section}}}|§ {{{section}}}]] for details.<!--
                     --> | [[Wikidata]] propert{{#if:{{{2|}}}|ies|y}}: {{#invoke:Uses Wikidata|usesProperty}} }}
}}{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|testcases|doc=<!--nocat-->|#default={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|Uses Wikidata|<!--
-->|{{module other|[[Category:Modules using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Modules tracking Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{template other|[[Category:Templates using data from Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates tracking Wikidata]]}} }}
  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}<!--Please add any categories to the /doc page -->
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]

  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]
 |text     = This {{module other|module|template}} [[:Category:{{{cat|Wikidata tracking categories}}}|tracks]] and uses<!--
--> {{#if:{{{section|}}} | one or more [[Wikidata]] properties; see [[#{{{section}}}|§ {{{section}}}]] for details.<!--
                     --> | [[Wikidata]] propert{{#if:{{{2|}}}|ies|y}}: {{#invoke:Uses Wikidata|usesProperty}} }}
}}{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|testcases|doc=<!--nocat-->|#default={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|Uses Wikidata|<!--
-->|{{module other| <!--
-->|{{template other| }} }}
  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}<!--Please add any categories to the /doc page -->
<noinclude>
[[Category:Modules using data from Wikidata]]
[[Category:Modules tracking Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates using data from Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates tracking Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><includeonly>{{sister project
 |position = {{{position|}}}
 |image    = [[File:Wikidata-logo-without-paddings.svg|30px|class=noviewer|alt=|link=]]
 |text     = This {{module other|module|template}} [[:Category:{{{cat|Wikidata tracking categories}}}|tracks]] and uses {{#if:{{{section|}}} | one or more [[Wikidata]] properties; see [[#{{{section}}}|§ {{{section}}}]] for details. | [[Wikidata]] propert{{#if:{{{2|}}}|ies|y}}: {{#invoke:Uses Wikidata|usesProperty}} }}
}}{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|testcases|doc=|#default={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|Uses Wikidata||{{module other| |{{template other| }} }}
  }}
}}</includeonly></onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Modules using data from Wikidata]]
[[Category:Modules tracking Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates using data from Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates tracking Wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
